mapper.select: select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id

select sc.course_id, sc.stock, sc.flag from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id
and flag = 1

select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id and sc.type = #{type}
and stock > 0 and flag = 1

select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id and college.name = #{name}
and stock > 0 and flag = 1

select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id and (stock between #{start} and #{end}-1)
and flag = 1
mapper.update: update selectable_course set stock = stock + 1 where course_id = #{courseId}
update selectable_course set stock = stock - 1 where course_id = #{courseId} and stock > 0
mapper.select: select stock from selectable_course where course_id = #{courseId}

select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id and course_name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and stock > 0 and flag = 1

select t.* from (select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id) t left outer join user_course on user_course.course_id = t.course_id where user_account = #{username} order by t.course_id asc

select t.course_id, t.course_name, t.college_id, t.college_name, t.teacher, t.type, t.course_score, t.stock, t.address, t.description, t.flag from ( select sc.*, college.name as college_name from selectable_course sc join college on sc.college_id = college.college_id where sc.stock > 0 ) t join user_course on user_course.course_id = t.course_id GROUP BY t.course_id, t.course_name, t.college_id, t.college_name order by t.course_id asc
mapper.update: update selectable_course set flag = case when flag = 1 then 0 else 1 end where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: insert into selectable_course (college_id, course_name, teacher, type, course_score, stock, address, description, flag) values (#{collegeId}, #{courseName}, #{teacher}, #{type}, #{courseScore}, #{stock}, #{address}, #{description}, 1)
mapper.update: update selectable_course set college_id = #{collegeId}, course_name = #{courseName}, teacher = #{teacher}, type = #{type}, course_score = #{courseScore}, stock = #{stock}, address = #{address}, description = #{description} where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select: select sc.*, college.name from selectable_course sc, college where sc.college_id = college.college_id and sc.course_id = #{courseId}

select sc.*, college.name as college_name from selectable_course sc left join college on sc.college_id = college.college_id
and sc.stock > 0 and sc.flag = 1
